task_completion.description: Export the original network to plain XML files.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a terminal command using 'netconvert' with the '--plain-output-prefix /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/zona30/pasubio_plain' flag, or a directory listing showing generated files like 'pasubio_plain.edg.xml' and 'pasubio_plain.nod.xml'.

task_completion.description: Modify edge speeds and save to the new edge file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a script (e.g., Python, sed, awk) or text editor modifying the 'speed' attribute to '8.33' for edges where speed was '<= 13.89', and saving the output to '/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/zona30/pasubio_zona30.edg.xml'.

task_completion.description: Reimport the plain XML files to generate the new SUMO network.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a 'netconvert' command taking the modified edge file ('pasubio_zona30.edg.xml') and original node/connection files to output '/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/zona30/pasubio_zona30.net.xml', or a file listing confirming its creation.

task_completion.description: Create or update the SUMO configuration file for the new scenario.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the contents of '/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/zona30/zona30.sumocfg' in a text editor or via 'cat', showing it references the new network ('pasubio_zona30.net.xml') and the required original route and additional files.

task_completion.description: Execute the SUMO simulation using the new configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for terminal output showing 'sumo -c /home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/zona30/zona30.sumocfg' (or similar) being run, with standard SUMO logging indicating simulation steps and successful completion.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent did not overwrite the original network file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent worked within the '/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/zona30' directory and did not modify '/home/ga/SUMO_Scenarios/bologna_pasubio/pasubio_buslanes.net.xml'.

integrity.description: Ensure the simulation was genuinely executed by SUMO.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for authentic SUMO terminal output logs (e.g., Step #, Warning/Error logs, Simulation ended) rather than a simple echo or mocked text output.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent actually processed the edge file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of a script execution (Python, bash) or a text editor being used to perform the speed replacements, rather than just copying the file without changes.
